findings.summary: Provider location types were returned directly even though the API contract only allows ROOFTOP or INTERPOLATED.
POST /internal/v1/geocoding/metadata overwrote existing parcel geocoding metadata when a different idempotency key was supplied.
The new geocoding endpoints lacked task-specific structured logs for request, replay, conflict, and success paths.
The package export still referenced internal_router after the internal geocoding router moved to src/api/geocoding.
